default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, workflow updates, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aida is transitioning to a new role; Jesselyn will take over as managing editor for Rapyd account](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [XML file process for blog post imports being refined; aiming for weekly batch uploads](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [18 blog posts published so far; seeing progress in views and SERP rankings](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to improve blog post scannability and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Workflow Updates

  - [Aida transitioning to onboarding team role; Jesselyn taking over as managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Rachel remaining on the account for continuity](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Discussing options for Rapyd team to access Airtable for content review process](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [XML file process being refined:](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Weekly batch uploads of .xml files to shared drive](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Posts to be separated with post tags for clear delineation](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Manual publishing to continue until XML setup is complete](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### Content Performance and Metrics

  - [18 blog posts published to date](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Seeing progress in views and SERP rankings](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Swift Alternative blog post now has featured snippet in UK Google search](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Telegraphic transfer vs wire transfer article appearing in AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Overall visibility for tracked keywords increased by 0.66%](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Team has access to Looker report for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Discussing potential for isolating blog traffic data in reports](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)

### Content Strategy and Improvements

  - [Team considering ways to improve blog post scannability](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Discussing potential for shorter posts and more bullet points](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Planning to gather more data before making significant format changes](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Considering A/B testing for CTAs, post length, and format once baseline data is established](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Engagement rate in GA4 being used as a metric for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
  - [Importance of visual breaks and images in content highlighted](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)

### CTA Implementation

  - [Team agreed on Option 1 for CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [Implementation pending development support](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
  - [Current process of integrating CTAs to continue until new system is ready](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to check with Kyle regarding Airtable access permissions for Rapyd team](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Aida to set up additional data views in Looker report to isolate blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Mark to circle back with Kristin on best practices for blog project management](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Continue current CTA integration process until development support is available for new implementation](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
  - [Team to monitor and report any repetitive feedback during content reviews](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Consider enriching top-performing blog posts with additional visuals and screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/_f4PFqPKHyQFyV8CFMkxh4dAKpysX7i8?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)

action_items.description: Check w/ Kyle re Airtable perms for Rapyd team (read-only access)
Create new Looker table for blog-specific data. Add data control filter to isolate blog traffic. Include views for whole site, /blog, and individual GrowthX URLs
Follow up w/ Kristin re best practices for blog project mgmt
